1.name: Sense Vitality
1.description: Detect how healthy an individual is or other blood information.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 474
Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 260

1.name: Sense Death
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 262

2.name: Anesthetic Touch
2.description: Remove feelings of pain from a target.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 474

2.name: Gift of Sleep
2.description: Put a living creature to sleep.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 260

2.name: Auguring the Sickness
2.description: Discover the severity and nature of a sickness plaguing a target.

2.name: Morphean Blow
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 262

3.name: Healer's Touch
3.description: Heal wounds of a mortal or a vampire with a touch, including bloodborne diseases.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 260

3.name: Peacemaker
3.description: Spread an aura of calm and peace.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 266

4.name: King David's Blessing
4.description: Through song or playing an instrument, help someone forget physical pain, draw them out of depression, or assist another healer.

4.name: Shepherd's Watch
4.description: Create a shield around the vampire that enemies cannot cross.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 260

5.name: The Ailing Spirit
5.description: Cure subject's Derangements, but cannot cure its own Derangements. Can bring temporary lucidity to a Malkavian.

5.name: Unburden the Bestial Soul
5.description: Draw someone's soul out; improve Path rating, adjust Virtues, and cure Derangements.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 261

6.name: Father's Judgement
6.description: Render a portion of a vampire's vitae inert.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 261

6.name: Warding the Beast
6.description: Draw someone's soul out; improve Path rating, adjust Virtues, and cure derangements.

6.name: Safe Passage
6.description: Receive hospitality and help regardless of local culture, and make it harder for hunters to find you.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 266

7.name: Blissful Gaze
7.description: Gift of Sleep and Healer's Touch no longer need touch; wound penalties are reversed when Healer's Touch is used.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 261

7.name: Sword of the Righteous
7.description: Cause a blade blooded with your vitae to blaze with heavenly fire and deal aggravated damage.

7.name: Safe Passage
7.description: Receive hospitality and help regardless of local culture, and make it harder for hunters to find you.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 266

8.name: Purification
8.description: Expel or exorcise a spirit or a demon, and bind it to your service.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 267

8.name: Rayzeel's Song
8.description: Make it easier to heal others (see Rayzeel).
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 261

9.name: Heaven's Gate
9.description: Resurrect a recently killed mortal as a Revenant.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 262

10.name: Heaven's Gate
10.description: Give life to a recently deceased cadaver without causing the Embrace or making the target a ghoul.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 262

3.name: Burning Touch
3.description: Cause a victim to feel debilitating agony and may cause Rötschreck in vampire victims.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 474
Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 262

4.name: Armor of Caine's Fury
4.description: Create mystical armor that protects you from harm and makes it easier to avoid fear Frenzy.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 474
Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 262

4.name: Ending the Watch
4.description: Painlessly kill a mortal who wants to die.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 263

5.name: Vengeance of Samiel
5.description: Make a single devastating blow that cannot be avoided.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 474-475

5.name: Ending the Watch
5.description: Painlessly kill a mortal who wants to die.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 263

6.name: Blissful Agony
6.description: Cause a victim to feel continuous pain that can cause damage or drive them to frenzy.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 475

6.name: Dream Combat
6.description: Draw the target's mind to a dreamscape.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 264

6.name: Samiel's Vengeance
6.description: Make a single devastating blow that cannot be avoided against anyone who has struck the vampire.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 264

6.name: Watching the Passage
6.description: Draw knowledge and energy from using Ending the Watch.

6.name: Fiery Agony
6.description: Enhances Burning Touch; touch is only needed to activate; continues while watching the target; harder for vampire targets to resist Rötschreck.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 265

7.name: Aversion
7.description: Cause a crowd to greatly dislike an individual, to harass or avoid him.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 266

7.name: Sword of the Righteous
7.description: Cause a blade blooded with your vitae to blaze with heavenly fire and deal aggravated damage.

8.name: Shadow of Taint
8.description: Purge an individual of infernal possession and force such demons into nearby objects, animals or people.

8.name: Song of the Blooded
8.description: Enter a battle trance; increase physical prowess; halo that blinds; immune to mind-influencing Disciplines (except Rayzeel's Song).
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 265

1.name: Sense Cycle
1.description: Sense the cycle of life entire, instinctively knowing when an individual or an event is important to your future.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 265

2.name: Peaceful Touch
2.description: Calm a hostile target with a touch, making it harder for him to strike you.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 265

3.name: Peacemaker
3.description: Spread an aura of calm and peace.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 266

3.name: Pariah's Caress
3.description: Mark a target with a bloody touch, making all his social interactions harder.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 265

4.name: Peacemaker
4.description: Spread an aura of calm and peace (as above).
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 266

5.name: Soul's Breath
5.description: Subsist on mortals' breaths instead of blood, or steal blood and power from other supernatural creatures through their breath.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 266

6.name: Safe Passage
6.description: Receive hospitality and help regardless of local culture, and make it harder for hunters to find you.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 266

7.name: Aversion
7.description: Enhances Pariah's Caress; causes others to greatly dislike and ostracize an individual, or turn hostile against him.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 266

8.name: Purification
8.description: Expel or exorcise a spirit or a demon, and bind it to your service.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 267

9.name: Soul Exchange
9.description: Exchange the souls of two individuals, exchanging their Roads, Virtues, and Natures.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 267
